name: Vivago Video Agent
tagline: Skip the prompting. Produce consistently compelling videos.
description: Vivago Video Agent lets you generate consistently compelling narrative videos with natural language. No more annoying prompting! Our video agent ensures every scene stays on-brand and internally coherent by guiding you through a structured creative process. Just share your assets and describe your story — a swarm of AI directors will invent characters and write a compelling story for you. See the keyframes before rendering. Your 1-min 1080P story video will be ready in 40 mins.

name: Fere AI
tagline: AI agents that turn signals into crypto + Polymarket trades
description: Unlike generic crypto research assistants, Fere turns market signals into autonomous trading workflows. Agents research opportunities, build trade setups, optimize routes and fees, execute with a wallet, and monitor strategies 24/7 across crypto and Polymarket. Standout features include autonomous Polymarket trading, entry/exit rules, stop-loss controls, execution routing, and lower-cost agent runs.

name: SUN-to-Spotify
tagline: Generate audio with SUN and send it to your Spotify library
description: Download 👉 https://github.com/sunapp-ai/sun-to-spotify SUN-to-Spotify is a skill that lets you generate AI podcasts, audiobooks, and then publish them directly to your Spotify library for streaming or offline listening. Just describe what you want to hear: startup advice, history deep dives, philosophy, news, or custom learning content, and SUN creates a personalized audio experience in minutes. Built for creators, developers, and curious minds exploring the future of AI native audio.

name: Files SDK
tagline: A unified storage SDK for object and blob backends
description: A unified storage SDK for object and blob backends. One small, honest API. Web-standards I/O. An escape hatch when you need the native client.

name: Kirki
tagline: WordPress finally has a freeform canvas website builder.
description: Kirki gives WordPress designers a freeform infinite canvas — design freely without structure imposed. Built-in CMS, real-time collaboration, visual interaction timeline, and 100+ template kits. Free for everyone.

name: OffShelf: Learn & Focus
tagline: Stop procrastenating on things you should learn!
description: OffShelf is a personal learning system that keeps you accountable, helps you stay consistent, and uses AI to decide what you should focus on next. Track deep work sessions, measure real progress, and grow your skills over time — not just your task list.

name: ChessBout
tagline: Multiple-choice chess duels & daily challenges ♟️
description: Most chess puzzle apps feel like study tools. ChessBout makes them feel like a game. Solve multiple-choice chess puzzles, play live 1v1 duels, compete in daily challenges, and climb global leaderboards in a fast mobile-first experience with no drag-to-move friction.

name: UGO — Autonomous Marketing
tagline: Marketing That Runs Itself
description: UGO writes your posts, publishes your blogs, builds your local SEO pages, and runs your ads — every month, automatically. Real content built from your brand. From $99/month. Setup in 30 minutes.

name: CodeBreak
tagline: Claude Code Companion. Done, Blocked, Broken - you'll know
description: Three things kept hitting me using Claude Code. Tab switching every 30 seconds just to check if it's still running. Claude silently blocking for 12 minutes while I was in another app. Coming back to find it finished or stuck 15 minutes ago. So I built CodeBreak. A pixel-art character walks your screen while CC runs. It celebrates when done, panics when it needs you, sulks on errors. $7 one-time. No sub. All future updates are free. Its for CC now, eventually will be Universal for all AI tools.

name: DashBuster
tagline: Replace em dashes on any website
description: Replace em dashes on any website. Pick your replacement character and see which sites overuse them the most. Tired of writers who think a 2-em-dash sentence like this makes them sound smarter? DashBuster silently replaces every em dash on any website with the character of your choice. One toggle. Zero tolerance.

name: Buy Blocker
tagline: Stop impulse buying with a pause before checkout
description: Free Chrome extension that intercepts "Add to Cart" buttons. When you click, a popup asks: "Do you really want this?" Choose to continue, save for later, or leave. Enable extra friction with Box Breathing or Math Mode to slow yourself down even more. Works on all shopping sites. No account. 100% private.

name: SkipTheMid
tagline: Hyper-regional dishes around the world
description: The UI has taken a complete overhaul. The map view is accesible from homepage and the recipes are tagged to continents, course and diet types. Also new recipes are added every week.

name: Mourning
tagline: A modern space for loss and remembrance
description: Mourning.io is a modern platform that helps families and friends navigate loss together - through memorial pages, shared memories, service coordination, tributes, and lasting digital remembrance.

name: Digital Twin Curators
tagline: AI curators trained on real human taste
description: Talk to AI curators trained on the cultural memory and taste of real people using RAG + fine-tuning. Discover films, books and music through unique personalities with human depth. One curator lives with aneurysm-related memory loss — with his permission, we created a Digital Twin of his knowledge so his recommendations could continue existing even when memory fails.

name: Ludr AI — Understand Any Screen
tagline: AI layer that understands and acts across your desktop
description: Ludr AI - is a screen AI for macOS and Windows. Press ⌥ Space anywhere to draw a box over code, a chart, a foreign menu, or an error — get a streamed answer right next to your selection. Press ⌘ ⇧ L on highlighted text in any app to ask without a screenshot. Follow-ups remember the whole thread. The model can extract text, fix grammar in place via Accessibility, draft replies into focused fields (Slack,Mail,Telegram), and render real charts inside the answer. Voice input too.

name: Screenshot Beautifier Pro
tagline: Elevate your screenshots
description: Elevate your captures into professional visuals with customizable gradients, 3D effects, and polished layouts.

name: Been There
tagline: Know Before You Go. Travel Smarter, Stay Safer.
description: BeenThere is a community-driven travel platform focused on something most travel apps ignore: Travel Safety. What makes BeenThere different: 🌍 Community-powered Safety Index ✨ Honest highlight & lowlight from people who’ve actually been there 🧭 Insider tips from real travelers ⚠️ Scam alerts & safety precautions 📍 Optional real-time location awareness 👣 Solo & female traveler safety insights Because travellers deserve more than ratingsthey deserve to know how safe a place actually feels.

name: FrankKi Briefe schreiben und versenden.
tagline: Schreib einen Brief auf dem Handy und verschicke ihn.
description: Briefe schreiben und per Post versenden, direkt vom iPhone. KI-Schreibhilfe, DIN 5008 Format, Deutsche Post Zustellung. Ohne Drucker, ohne Briefmarke.

name: Abakada.org
tagline: Free and open-source software tools for Filipino users.
description: Abakada.org is a web-based platform that helps students and educators discover free and open-source alternatives to commonly used paid software tools. It focuses on improving digital accessibility by curating practical tools for learning, productivity, design, and development without requiring expensive licenses. The platform is designed to support education by making software resources easier to find and use.

name: SnapSub - subscriptions hub
tagline: SnapSub - Stop paying for subscriptions you forgot about
description: Most people are paying for 3–4 subscriptions they've forgotten about. The average? $204 wasted per year. SnapSub is a clean, no-account iOS app that helps you track every subscription in one place, eg: streaming, SaaS, gym, whatever.. Set renewal reminders, see your real monthly spend at a glance, and stop getting surprised by charges you forgot about. No bank connection required. No ads. No account. Just open it, add your subscriptions, and know exactly where your money goes.
